content:
2 min read
Just now

--

Every business owner asks the same question:
“What happens if someone breaks in after hours?”
Traditional security systems do a great job at detecting a burglary.
They send notifications.
They activate sirens.
They record video.
But they don’t actually stop the intruder.
That simple question led us to create FogAway.
⸻
The Problem with Traditional Security
Imagine you own a jewelry store, electronics shop, pharmacy, or luxury boutique.
An intruder breaks in.
Within seconds they can grab thousands — or even hundreds of thousands — of dollars worth of inventory before anyone arrives.
Even if the police are notified immediately, the damage is often already done.
Recording the theft isn’t the same as preventing it.
⸻
Introducing FogAway
FogAway is an instant security fog system designed to stop intruders before they can steal anything.
When a break-in is detected — or whenever you choose — you simply open the mobile app and press Activate.
Within seconds, the protected area is filled with an incredibly dense, non-toxic security fog.
Visibility drops to nearly zero.
The intruder can’t see.
Can’t navigate.
Can’t locate valuables.
And in most cases…
They simply leave.
⸻
Security That Acts Immediately
FogAway isn’t about chasing criminals.
It’s about removing their opportunity.
Instead of relying only on cameras and alarms, FogAway creates an environment where continuing the burglary becomes nearly impossible.
Your inventory stays protected.
Your employees stay safer.
Your business remains secure.
⸻
Built for Modern Businesses
FogAway is ideal for:

• Jewelry stores

• * Mobile phone shops

• * Luxury boutiques

• * Pharmacies

• * Cannabis dispensaries

• * Electronics retailers

• * Warehouses

• * Offices

• * Storage facilities
Any business where every second matters.
⸻
Smart Control From Anywhere
Whether you’re at home, on vacation, or traveling for work, FogAway stays connected.
Using the mobile app you can:

• Activate the system remotely

• * Receive instant alerts

• * Monitor your business

• * React within seconds
Security should never depend on how close you are to your store.
⸻
Designed to Blend In
We wanted something that looked like modern technology — not industrial equipment.
FogAway features a clean, minimalist design that integrates naturally into premium retail environments.
It’s compact.
Elegant.
Powerful.
Built to protect without drawing attention.
⸻
Prevention Is Better Than Recovery
Every business owner hopes they’ll never experience a break-in.
But hope isn’t a security strategy.
The best security systems don’t just notify you after something happens.
They actively prevent loss.
That’s exactly what FogAway was built to do.
⸻
Looking Ahead
We’re incredibly excited about what’s next.
Our mission is simple:
Help businesses protect what they’ve worked so hard to build.
Technology should make criminals think twice — not business owners.
If you’re interested in learning more about FogAway or following our journey, we’d love to connect.
Because when it comes to protecting your business…
Every second counts.
